# Pattern Name: [particle/form 1] / [particle/form 2]

<!-- One-line intro: what this pattern expresses and when to use it -->
Learn how to express [concept] using **[form 1]** and **[form 2]**.

## Key Expressions

<!-- Always the first content section. List the core forms covered in this article. -->

| Hiragana | Romaji | English | Type |
|----------|--------|---------|------|
| [pattern 1] | [romaji] | [meaning] | [conjunction/particle/expression] |
| [pattern 2] | [romaji] | [meaning] | [conjunction/particle/expression] |

## Pattern 1: [Name] ([More Formal])

<!-- State the structure formula in bold, then explain the meaning. -->

**[verb/adjective short form] (な) + [pattern 1], ...**

**Meaning:** "[translation of pattern]"

:::tip [Memory Trick Title]
[Mnemonic or tip to remember the pattern or when to use it.]
:::

### By Word Type

<!-- Add only the subsections that apply. Remove unused subsections. -->

#### With Verbs

**[verb short form] + [pattern]**

- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*
- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*

#### With い-Adjectives

**[い-adjective] + [pattern]**

- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*

#### With な-Adjectives

**[な-adjective] + な + [pattern]**

- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*

#### With Nouns

**[noun] + な + [pattern]**

- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*

:::info [Particle/form] has another use
**[particle]** can also [describe the second use]. See the [[Article Name]](./article-link) article for more.
:::

## Pattern 2: [Name] ([Less Formal])

<!-- Only include this section when comparing two related forms (e.g. formal vs casual).

**[structure formula]**

**Meaning:** "[translation]"

### Examples

- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*
- [Japanese sentence] — [English translation].
  - *[romaji]*

### Same Sentence, Both Ways

<!-- Always show the same example in both patterns when comparing. See reason.md. -->

**[Pattern 1] ([formal/casual]):**
- [Japanese] — [English].
  - *[romaji]*

**[Pattern 2] ([formal/casual]):**
- [Japanese] — [English].
  - *[romaji]*
